items.title: Chrome for Mac breaks benchmark records on the latest MacBook Pro
items.summary: A new post on Google's Chromium blog shares the results of the latest Chrome performance benchmarks, including record scores on tests running on an M5 MacBook Pro. Here are the details.

items.title: iFixit tears down fake Apple Watch Ultra 3, AirPods Max 2, and AirPods Pro 3
items.summary: iFixit recently visited the Huaqiangbei district of Shenzhen, China, where they bought Apple Watch Ultra 3, AirPods Max 2, and AirPods Pro 3 knockoffs, took them back to the studio, and immediately disassembled them. Here's what they found.

items.title: Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft's board to go 'founder mode' with startup Manus
items.summary: After a very profitable decade on Microsoft's board, Reid Hoffman is stepping down to focus on his AI drug discovery startup Manus.

items.title: T1 Energy buys KORE Power to cash in on the AI power boom
items.summary: T1 Energy , formerly known as FREYR Battery, is buying battery storage and software company KORE Power in a deal aimed at growing its presence in the fast-expanding energy storage and AI data center markets.

items.title: The better way to use Gemini on the Mac
items.summary: Back in April, Google joined OpenAI and Anthropic in offering a dedicated Mac app for its AI chatbot software. Two months later, it's clear that Gemini for Mac isn't as good as it could be.

items.title: What to Expect From WWDC 2026: Gemini-Powered Siri, iOS 27, macOS 27 and
items.summary: Apple's 2026 Worldwide Developers Conference is just days away, and it's going to be an interesting event because it will give us a look at Apple's AI plans. We'll see how Apple is going to compete with OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google in the...

items.title: Apple Starts Selling Refurbished Apple Watch Series 11, Ultra 3, and SE 3
items.summary: Apple is now selling refurbished versions of the Apple Watch Series 11 , Apple Watch Ultra 3 , and Apple Watch SE 3 at discounted prices. This is the first time the Series 11, Ultra 3, and SE 3 have been available through Apple's online...

items.title: Read-Centric DTCO for IGZO FeFETs 3D Heterogeneous AI memories (imec, KU Leuven)
items.summary: Researchers from imec and KU Leuven have published "DTCO of NOR-Type IGZO FeFETs for 3D Heterogeneous AI Memories: A Read-Centric Perspective". Abstract excerpt "This work evaluates the viability of NOR-type IGZO FeFETs for 3D...

items.title: Seattle to pass one-year AI data center moratorium next week - will use window to study community impact of AI buildouts
items.summary: Two Seattle city council committees have passed a one-year moratorium and a resolution on data centers. The measures are still up for a vote in the full council, but many consider that simply as a formality.

items.title: True distance awareness with Bluetooth(R) Channel Sounding
